# LJC Construction

> Licensed and insured general contractor serving Jefferson County and St. Louis County, Missouri.

LJC Construction is a full-service general contractor based in Crystal City, MO. Owner Joe Alvarez has over 10 years of experience in residential and commercial construction. We handle both interior and exterior projects, pull permits when required, and back every job with a workmanship warranty. Free estimates. No travel fees within 30 miles.

## Contact

- Phone: (314) 649-3111
- Email: home@ljcllc.net
- Address: 2340 N Truman Blvd, Crystal City, MO 63028
- Hours: Monday through Friday, 9am to 5pm
- Website: https://ljcllc.net

## Services

- Roofing (new installation, repairs, full replacement)
- Siding and fascia
- Gutters
- Concrete (driveways and flatwork)
- Deck building and repair
- Fencing
- Framing
- Drywall
- Interior and exterior painting
- Finish carpentry
- Flooring
- Electrical

## Service Area

Jefferson County, Missouri: Arnold, Festus, Hillsboro, De Soto, Imperial, Herculaneum, Crystal City, High Ridge

St. Louis County, Missouri: Chesterfield, Webster Groves, Kirkwood, West County, and surrounding areas

## Key Facts

- Licensed and insured; proof of insurance provided on request
- Handles permit and inspection process for work that requires permits
- Workmanship warranty on all projects; manufacturer warranties on materials
- Residential and commercial work (build-outs, tenant improvements, repairs)
- Written proposal with agreed payment schedule before work begins; deposit to start, final payment when satisfied
